comment: EM absent: make iron-group + galena nugget crushing 1:1 by bumping ONLY quantity.avg (.33 -> 1). We deliberately do NOT replace the whole crushing entry or touch crushedStack, so the vanilla, per-version crushed code is preserved automatically (crushed-iron on every version; galena -> crushed-galena on 1.22, crushed-leadoxide before 1.22). An earlier version replaced the whole entry and hard-coded a version-specific crushed code, which crashed every client when the code did not resolve: vanilla CollectibleObject.GetHeldItemInfo computes quantity.avg * CrushedStack.ResolvedItemstack.StackSize with a 'crushingProps != null' guard but NO null-check on Quantity or CrushedStack.ResolvedItemstack, and CreateSearchCache builds a tooltip for every item on world-load. Cassiterite/chromite/ilmenite stay at vanilla 0.33. Gated off when EM is present (its full /crushingPropsByType replace already yields 1:1).
